text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to walk past the academy<n>gates,
when...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there, Opera O! How many<n>times
have I told you not to cover our<n>room in roses?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wish you would give more thought<n>toward your
roommate—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha! My apologies!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, alas, an Overlord like myself<n>must radiate
aesthetical grandiosity.<n>Roses are vital, as such!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I said wait!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Honestly, she never listens to me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how you do that first<n>thing in the
morning. I guess you just<n>can't help it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's just you, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, a cluttered room leads to a<n>deterioration in
quality of life, as well<n>as a decrease in work
efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was merely stating my opinion in<n>order to
prevent that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Stop, Brian. Your collar appears to be<n>crooked by
roughly 0.5 degrees.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Are you for real?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're part of the student council.<n>You have to
look the part.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I suppose I'll fix it for you this time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, give me a break. What's the<n>point of being
uptight about<n>everything?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It's so dumb.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hey! Hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wait, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Quit following me! I don't have time<n>for your
nagging.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gah! She's getting away!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(Her rapid acceleration is leagues<n>above the
average Umamusume!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I don't think I can catch up when she<n>goes at
full speed!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Urk.. Is giving up my only option?)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, I cannot! I'll lose sleep over<n>Brian's crooked
collar!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What formidable acceleration!<n>Perhaps this is a
signal to work on my<n>own technique!
